<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>void invoice</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"patch"} path={"/org/{orgId}/entitlement/{entitlementId}/invoice/{invoiceId}/void"}></MethodEndpoint>



Void the invoice. It can be used for manual void or cancel the invoice.

## Request
